rules: No Inter, Roboto, or standard defaults.
H1 size capped at text-4xl sm:text-5xl.
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase, tiny, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Strict Swiss/High-Contrast approach. Use color only for function.
Tinted greys rule: Neutral greys are tinted slightly blue (Slate).
Hover states must be explicitly defined and have accessible contrast.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: The Control Room Grid (Density, Data Correlation, Scanability)
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Max 6px border-radius (rounded-md). Sharp edges for a professional ERP feel.
rules: Always ensure borders have internal padding.
Avoid card overload, use flat boundaries where appropriate.
Grid children must be direct children of the grid container.

components.navigation: Sidebar for main modules (Tableau de bord, Avocats). Topbar for user menu and global search. Sticky header with Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200).
components.data_table: Shadcn UI Table. High density, compact padding (py-2 px-4). Must include search input, status filter dropdown, and pagination.
components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Left-aligned labels. Use a Sheet (Slide-over) or Dialog for 'Créer / modifier un avocat' to keep context of the list.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no drop shadow by default. Hover adds slight lift and shadow-sm.

icons.style: Duotone or Regular weight, strictly functional.

components.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='avocat-search-input').

login_background.description: Minimalist white architecture. Use as a split-screen background for the login page to convey structure and professionalism.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle background shifts on list items (hover:bg-slate-50).
motion_and_interaction.loading: Skeleton loaders for data tables instead of spinners.

instructions_to_main_agent: All text, labels, and placeholders MUST be in French (fr-CA).
Implement Shadcn UI components but adjust the rounded corners to rounded-md for an ERP feel.
Make sure the Fiche Avocat includes all requested fields: nom, prénom, code, section barreau, NEQ, NAS, statut actif/passif, date inscription, adresse courante, téléphone, email, commentaires.
Apply data-testid to all buttons, links, inputs, and major UI components using kebab-case role-based naming.
Ensure login page uses JWT strategy (mock the auth flow if backend is not present, but build the UI).
